data.title: 国际服OST「Target for Love」公开
data.summary: 💙Official OST Gift💙 Sensei! Blue Archive’s Beloved OST, “Target for Love” by Jin-Ah Lee is now avail
data.body:
💙Official OST Gift💙

Sensei! Blue Archive’s Beloved OST, “Target for Love” by Jin-Ah Lee is now available to download for free (until further notice)!

- Find out more on our Forum: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/94726

#BlueArchive
